top_signals.title: Andy Burnham apologises for Labour’s Gaza war stance
top_signals.summary: Britain’s likely next prime minister seeks to win back leftwing voters outraged by Keir Starmer’s approach to Israel
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: 30-Year Real Yield Near Financial Crisis Level
top_signals.summary: Subadra Rajappa, head of US rates strategy at Société Générale, and Vineer Bhansali, founder of LongTail Alpha, joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Long-end Treasury real yields climbed to the highest in nearly two decades, signaling investors will increasingly need protection from policy uncertainty. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Stride promises tax cuts as Tories seek to draw dividing line with Burnham
top_signals.summary: Shadow chancellor vows ‘responsible radicalism’ and decries ‘managerial incrementalism, which we have had for too long’
